title: pelargonium rubiginosum
intro: Pelargonium rubiginosum, also known as the Rose Geranium, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and PMS. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium rubiginosum include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and traditional medicine.
